items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [synopsis].
items.summary: A critically appraised paper found that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation offered comparable improvements in exercise capacity and superior improvements in health status compared to center-based rehabilitation for individuals with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 针对 COPD 患者，移动端肺康复在运动能力上不劣于中心化康复，并在健康状况上有更优改善。这意味着远程康复对稳定期 COPD 患者不仅可行，甚至在某些方面有优势，能扩大可及性。
items.titleZh: 评价性论文：移动端肺康复对 COPD 患者运动能力改善不劣于中心化康复，且对健康状况改善更优。
items.summaryZh: 一篇评价性论文发现，针对慢性阻塞性肺病（COPD）患者，移动端肺康复在运动能力改善上与中心化康复相当，但在健康状况改善方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: For COPD patients, mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is non-inferior to center-based rehab in exercise capacity and superior in health status. This suggests remote rehab is not only feasible for stable COPD patients but may offer advantages in some aspects, significantly improving accessibility.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers are concurrently associated with total physical activity levels.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的躯体活动水平受疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力多重影响。制定干预计划时，别只盯着运动强度，需要整合性评估并解决这些潜在障碍，才能提高依从性。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的躯体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究发现，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与总躯体活动水平同时相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physical activity levels in women with obesity are influenced by fatigue, knee symptoms, and functional capacity. When designing interventions, look beyond just exercise intensity; address these underlying barriers through integrated assessment to improve adherence.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法推断因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, causality cannot be inferred.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis of RCTs found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) was superior to low-load exercise (LLE) and comparable to high-load exercise (HLE) for improving muscle strength, pain, and disability in musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 对肌肉骨骼康复中的血流限制（BFR）训练，这篇系统综述和荟萃分析证实了低负荷 BFR 在改善肌力、减轻疼痛和残疾方面优于传统低负荷运动，且与高负荷运动效果相当。这意味着你可以更自信地在康复初期或高负荷运动不耐受的患者中使用 BFR。
items.titleZh: 血流限制训练在肌肉骨骼康复中是否比传统运动有额外益处？一项系统综述与荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项对随机临床试验的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，与传统低负荷运动相比，低负荷血流限制运动（LLE-BFR）在改善肌肉骨骼疾病患者的肌力、疼痛和残疾方面更优，且与高负荷运动效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms that low-load blood flow restriction (BFR) exercise is superior to conventional low-load exercise and comparable to high-load exercise for improving muscle strength, reducing pain, and disability in musculoskeletal rehabilitation. You can more confidently integrate BFR into early rehabilitation or for patients intolerant to high-load exercises.
items.limitation: 该综述未明确报告各个结局指标的异质性程度或具体效应量的临床意义，可能需要关注不同疾病类型和 BFR 方案的适用性。
items.limitationEn: The review did not explicitly report the heterogeneity for each outcome or the clinical significance of specific effect sizes, suggesting a need to consider the applicability across different conditions and BFR protocols.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: This pilot RCT at a Swiss hospital ED found high agreement between physiotherapists' and resident physicians' diagnoses, treatment plans, and discharge decisions for musculoskeletal conditions compared to senior physicians, supporting Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊科的初级评估中，物理治疗师与住院医师对肌肉骨骼疾病的诊断、治疗和出院决策与资深医师有良好的一致性。这意味着高级物理治疗执业（APP）模式在急诊场景下是可行的，可以作为缓解急诊压力、提高诊疗效率的有效策略。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼功能障碍诊断和治疗的初级协议。一项前瞻性、随机对照研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项在瑞士医院急诊科进行的试点随机对照研究发现，物理治疗师和住院医师对肌肉骨骼疾病的诊断、治疗和出院决策与资深医师具有良好的一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: In the initial assessment of musculoskeletal dysfunctions in the emergency department, physiotherapists and resident physicians show good agreement with senior physicians on diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions. This indicates that Advanced Physiotherapy Practice (APP) roles are feasible in emergency settings, offering an effective strategy to alleviate ED burden and improve care efficiency.
items.limitation: 本研究是在一个特定医院的急诊科进行的试点性随机对照研究，其结果在不同医疗系统和患者群体中的普适性有待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This pilot randomized controlled study was conducted in a specific hospital's emergency department, and the generalizability of its findings to other healthcare systems and patient populations requires further validation.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of 9 patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy was developed and grouped into three domains: functioning, participation, and well-being, suitable for daily practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发了一套适用于儿童物理治疗的核心患者报告结局（PRO）和测量工具（PROM）。这意味着你在日常实践、研究和质量评估中，可以参考这套工具来更系统地评估患儿的功能、参与和幸福感，从而提高评估的全面性和标准化。
items.titleZh: 为儿童物理治疗开发核心患者报告结局（测量）集。
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了适用于儿童物理治疗的核心患者报告结局（PROs）和相应的测量工具（PROMs）的集合，共包含 9 个 PROs，分为功能、参与和幸福感三个领域，适用于日常实践、研究和质量评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a core set of patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy. This means you can refer to this toolset in daily practice, research, and quality assessment to more systematically evaluate children's functioning, participation, and well-being, enhancing the comprehensiveness and standardization of assessments.
items.limitation: 研究结果基于焦点小组和专家小组的共识，其在不同文化背景和医疗系统中的普适性以及具体 PROMs 的 psychometric 性能仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: The study findings are based on consensus from focus groups and an expert panel, so the generalizability to different cultural contexts and healthcare systems, as well as the psychometric properties of specific PROMs, requires further validation.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT (n=30) found that an 8-week intervention using a dynamic wrist-hand stretching device significantly improved flexor spasticity and hand function in chronic stroke patients with mild-to-moderate spasticity compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性卒中后的腕手屈肌痉挛，动态牵伸装置在短期（8 周）内显示出改善效果，尤其适用于轻中度痉挛患者。这提示你可以考虑将这类辅助装置纳入慢性卒中患者居家康复方案，以维持或改善手功能。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸装置改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项试点随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项试点随机对照试验（n=30）发现，与对照组相比，使用动态腕手牵伸装置进行 8 周干预显著改善了慢性卒中伴轻中度痉挛患者的屈肌痉挛和手功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic post-stroke wrist and hand flexor spasticity, a dynamic stretching device showed improvement over 8 weeks, especially in patients with mild-to-moderate spasticity. This suggests you could consider incorporating such assistive devices into home rehabilitation programs for chronic stroke patients to maintain or improve hand function.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本（30 例）试点 RCT，且随访期较短（8 周），长期效果和对更严重痉挛患者的疗效尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: This was a small-sample (30 patients) pilot RCT with a short follow-up period (8 weeks), so the long-term effects and efficacy for more severe spasticity are unclear.

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: This meta-analysis evaluated the short-term and long-term therapeutic effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease patients, identifying stimulation site, coil type, stimulation frequency, and regimen as modulating factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析证实了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病患者运动功能的短期改善作用，并识别了刺激部位、线圈类型和频率等调节因素。在临床实践中，这意味着 rTMS 可作为辅助治疗手段，但具体参数选择需考虑患者个体差异及治疗方案的频率和脉冲数量。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能的疗效和调节因素：一项荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病患者运动功能的短期和长期疗效，并识别了刺激部位、线圈类型、刺激频率和治疗方案频率等调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis confirms the short-term improvement of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease, identifying modulating factors like stimulation site, coil type, and frequency. This implies rTMS can be an adjunctive therapy, but parameter selection needs to consider individual patient differences, treatment regimen frequency, and pulse count.
items.limitation: 本荟萃分析仅评估了 rTMS 的短期和长期疗效，未深入探讨不同调节因素（如刺激部位、频率）对长期预后的影响，且纳入研究均为英文文献，可能存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This meta-analysis only evaluated short-term and long-term effects of rTMS and did not deeply explore the impact of different modulating factors (e.g., stimulation site, frequency) on long-term outcomes; also, only English-language studies were included, potentially introducing publication bias.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review aimed to establish weighted criteria for return to play (RTP) after hamstring injury, highlighting the current lack of clear consensus and the high recurrence rate of these injuries.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述识别了目前关于腘绳肌损伤重返运动（RTP）的加权标准，提示目前缺乏共识，且复发率高。在实践中，你需要谨慎评估 RTP 标准，并可能需要结合多维度评估而非单一标准，同时与患者充分沟通复发风险。
items.titleZh: 建立腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述旨在建立腘绳肌损伤后重返运动（RTP）的加权标准，强调目前在该领域缺乏明确共识以及腘绳肌损伤的高复发率。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review identifies weighted criteria for return to play (RTP) after hamstring injury, highlighting a lack of consensus and high recurrence rates. In practice, you need to cautiously evaluate RTP criteria, potentially combining multi-dimensional assessments rather than single standards, and thoroughly discuss recurrence risks with patients.
items.limitation: 本系统综述发现的 RTP 加权标准缺乏共识，可能反映了现有证据的异质性和局限性，其在不同运动类型和损伤严重程度上的普适性有待验证。
items.limitationEn: The lack of consensus on weighted RTP criteria found in this systematic review may reflect heterogeneity and limitations in existing evidence, and its generalizability across different sports and injury severities needs further validation.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1,372) found that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.02, -0.43]; p < .01) in patients with knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析明确指出短波透热疗法（SWD）对膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛和步行能力有显著改善作用。这意味着你可以更有信心地将 SWD 作为 KOA 非手术治疗的有效辅助手段，尤其在减轻疼痛和改善功能方面。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 17 项试验（n=1,372）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均值 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和步行能力（平均值 -0.72；95% CI [-1.02, -0.43]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis clearly indicates that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improves pain and walking ability in knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. This means you can more confidently incorporate SWD as an effective adjunctive non-surgical treatment for KOA, especially for pain relief and functional improvement.
items.limitation: 虽然该综述纳入了 17 项试验，但仍需关注不同研究间的异质性（I² 统计量未明确报告），以及不同 SWD 方案的具体参数对疗效的影响。

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An 8-week visual perturbation training program significantly improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors in male athletes following ACL reconstruction who had returned to sport, compared to a control group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者的视觉扰动训练能显著改善非预期性切入动作的下肢生物力学和错误，这对于避免二次损伤至关重要。这意味着在重返运动训练中，除了传统的体能和协调性训练，你应更注重加入模拟实战的认知-运动双任务（例如视觉扰动），以弥补神经肌肉缺陷。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员 8 周视觉扰动训练对非预期性切入下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照临床试验显示，在前交叉韧带重建术后已重返运动的男性运动员中，8 周视觉扰动训练显著改善了非预期性切入动作时的下肢生物力学并减少了错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual perturbation training significantly improves lower-limb biomechanics and reduces errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in ACLR athletes, crucial for preventing re-injury. This means you should prioritize incorporating cognitive-motor dual-task training (e.g., visual perturbations) that simulate real-game scenarios into return-to-sport programs, beyond traditional physical and coordination drills, to address neuromuscular deficits.
items.limitation: 该研究仅针对已重返运动的男性 ACLR 运动员，结果对女性运动员、处于康复更早期阶段的患者或不同运动项目运动员的适用性有待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This study focused solely on male ACLR athletes who had returned to sport, so the generalizability of results to female athletes, patients in earlier rehabilitation stages, or athletes in different sports requires further validation.

items.title: Recent highlights in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke.
items.summary: This systematic review identified 118 RCTs, protocols, and systematic reviews with meta-analyses published since 2020, highlighting recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke and providing recommendations for future trials.
items.curatedReason: 这篇系统综述总结了卒中后运动恢复和康复研究的最新进展。它为你提供了高水平证据，指明哪些干预措施有效，哪些有待深入研究。你应将其作为更新临床实践和制定未来研究方向的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 卒中后运动恢复与康复研究的最新亮点
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述识别了自 2020 年以来发表的 118 项 RCT、研究方案和荟萃分析系统综述，强调了卒中后运动恢复与康复研究的最新进展，并为未来的试验提供了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review summarizes recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke. It provides you with high-level evidence, indicating which interventions are effective and which require further investigation. You should use it as a key reference for updating clinical practice and shaping future research directions.
items.limitation: 纳入的 RCTs 和系统综述样本量限制在 n ≥ 100 参与者，可能遗漏了小型但有价值的研究。
items.limitationEn: Included RCTs and systematic reviews were limited to a sample size of n ≥ 100 participants, potentially omitting smaller but valuable studies.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: This benefit-harm trade-off study using an online survey with 92 athletes estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction plus rehabilitation versus rehabilitation alone for improving knee function and return to sport.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究量化了 ACL 重建手术与非手术管理在膝关节功能和重返运动方面“最小有益效应”。你在与患者讨论 ACL 损伤治疗方案时，可以引用这些数据，帮助他们权衡不同方案的利弊。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术管理最小有益效应的比较：一项利弊权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 92 名运动员的利弊权衡研究通过在线调查，评估了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建加康复与单纯康复在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study quantifies the "smallest worthwhile effect" of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management on knee function and return to sport. When discussing ACL injury treatment options with patients, you can cite these data to help them weigh the pros and cons of different approaches.
items.limitation: 研究结果基于参与者的主观意愿和偏好，可能与实际临床效果存在差异。
items.limitationEn: The study results are based on participants' subjective preferences and desires, which may differ from actual clinical outcomes.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: This review of 1,548 RCTs found that low-to-middle income countries (LMICs) tend to use more generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures that rely on patient observation compared to high-income countries (HICs) in stroke lower extremity motor rehabilitation trials.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述揭示了卒中下肢康复 RCT 在不同收入国家间结局指标使用模式的差异。这意味着你在评估跨国研究时，需留意所用量表的异质性，理解其对结果可比性的影响。
items.titleZh: 不同收入国家卒中康复下肢试验中结局指标利用模式的差异
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 1,548 项 RCT 的综述发现，在卒中下肢运动康复试验中，与高收入国家相比，中低收入国家倾向于使用更多依赖患者观察的综合性损伤和日常生活活动结局指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review reveals discrepancies in outcome measure utilization patterns in stroke lower extremity rehabilitation RCTs between different income countries. This means you need to be mindful of the heterogeneity of scales used when evaluating international studies, understanding their impact on result comparability.
items.limitation: 纳入标准限制为英文发表的 RCTs，可能遗漏其他语言或研究设计的相关研究。
items.limitationEn: Inclusion criteria were limited to RCTs published in English, potentially omitting relevant studies in other languages or with different study designs.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study of 92 AUVP patients found that an 8-week visuo-vestibular physical therapy program improved anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) as assessed by the Suppression Head Impulse Paradigm (SHIMP), suggesting AcS may reflect central compensation.
items.curatedReason: 这项观察性研究提示，视听-前庭物理治疗可改善急性单侧前庭病变患者的反补偿性眼跳，表明 AcS 可能是评估前庭中枢代偿的一个生物标志物。在临床上，可将 SHIMP 作为跟踪 VVPT 效果的工具。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病变患者经视听-前庭物理治疗后反补偿性眼跳的变化：一项前瞻性观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项针对 92 名急性单侧前庭病变患者的前瞻性观察性研究发现，为期 8 周的视听-前庭物理治疗项目改善了通过抑制性头部冲击范式 (SHIMP) 评估的反补偿性眼跳，提示反补偿性眼跳可能反映了中枢代偿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study suggests that visuo-vestibular physical therapy can improve anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) in patients with acute unilateral vestibulopathy, indicating that AcS may serve as a biomarker for central vestibular compensation. Clinically, you can use SHIMP to track the effects of VVPT.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且缺乏对照组来直接比较干预效果。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality, and lacked a control group for direct comparison of intervention effects.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: This multi-method study integrated a narrative review, a two-round Delphi process with 15 experts, and multi-criteria decision-making to identify and quantitatively prioritize fall-prevention strategies for people with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项多方法评估为帕金森病患者的跌倒预防策略提供了量化优先级。你在临床实践中可以参考这些优先级，优化干预方案的资源分配，更有效地降低跌倒风险。
items.titleZh: 优先排序帕金森病跌倒预防策略：一项多方法评估
items.summaryZh: 这项多方法研究整合了叙述性综述、与 15 名专家进行的两轮德尔菲法以及多标准决策分析，旨在识别并量化优先排序帕金森病患者的跌倒预防策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-method evaluation provides a quantitative prioritization of fall prevention strategies for people with Parkinson's disease. You can use these priorities in clinical practice to optimize resource allocation for interventions, more effectively reducing fall risk.
items.limitation: 研究结果基于专家共识和决策分析，而非随机对照试验，可能受专家主观判断影响。
items.limitationEn: The study results are based on expert consensus and decision analysis, not randomized controlled trials, and may be influenced by expert subjective judgment.

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study explored the associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in stroke patients, finding potential links to poorer functional recovery and quality of life after a 4-week inpatient rehabilitation program.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性观察性研究提示，卒中后的神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与较差的康复结局相关。这意味着在卒中康复中，你需要主动筛查并管理这类疼痛和心理因素，以期改善患者的长期功能恢复和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与卒中患者康复结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察性研究探讨了卒中患者神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与康复结局的关联，发现在为期 4 周的住院康复计划后，两者可能与较差的功能恢复和生活质量相关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective observational study suggests that neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing post-stroke are associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes. This means you need to actively screen for and manage these pain and psychological factors in stroke rehabilitation to improve patients' long-term functional recovery and quality of life.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，无法确立神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与康复结局之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This observational study cannot establish a causal relationship between neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing and rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: This two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial explored the feasibility of the TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, recruiting adults with activity-related joint pain for at least 3 months.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 数字项目在可行性上通过了验证。这意味着后续会有大规模 RCT 来检验其疗效。现在你可以关注这类数字工具的临床整合潜力，但不要急于将其作为常规干预。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项数字物理治疗支持的肌肉骨骼疼痛自我管理项目随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 这项两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验，旨在探索 TRAK MSK 数字物理治疗支持的自我管理项目用于肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的可行性，招募了有至少 3 个月活动相关关节疼痛的成年人。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK digital program has demonstrated feasibility, paving the way for larger RCTs to evaluate its efficacy. You can now monitor the potential for integrating such digital tools into clinical practice, but do not rush to adopt it as a routine intervention.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性试验，而非疗效试验，结果不能直接外推到临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility trial, not an efficacy trial, so results cannot be directly extrapolated to clinical outcomes.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: This survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement, indicating limited evidence and potential impact on patient recovery and fear of movement.
items.curatedReason: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制缺乏共识，导致 PT 建议存在巨大差异。这提醒你，在给出建议时要基于现有证据，并向患者解释不确定性，以减少其运动恐惧。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查
items.summaryZh: 这项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在重大差异，表明现有证据有限，并可能影响患者的康复和运动恐惧。
items.curatedReasonEn: There is a significant lack of consensus on long-term activity restrictions post-knee replacement, leading to wide variations in PT recommendations. This highlights the importance of basing your advice on available evidence and discussing uncertainties with patients to mitigate kinesiophobia.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于瑞典的物理治疗师，结果的跨文化和跨地区外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to Swedish physiotherapists, limiting cross-cultural and regional generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This commentary emphasizes the growing prevalence of hip osteoarthritis (OA) in young adults and argues that early-stage symptomatic hip OA presents a critical window for intervention to potentially slow or change its trajectory, an area often overlooked in research and clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评强调了早期阶段症状性髋关节骨关节炎的识别和干预的重要性。你应该关注年轻成人髋关节 OA 的早期筛查，并在临床上积极探索和应用早期非手术治疗策略，以期改变疾病进展轨迹。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个干预的窗口期
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评强调了年轻成人髋关节骨关节炎（OA）日益增长的患病率，并指出早期症状性髋关节 OA 提供了一个关键的干预窗口，可能减缓或改变其病程，而这在研究和临床实践中常被忽视。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the importance of identifying and intervening in early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis. You should focus on early screening for hip OA in young adults and actively explore and apply early non-surgical treatment strategies in clinical practice to potentially alter disease progression.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A 12-week pragmatic quasi-experimental study involving 72 institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia demonstrated multi-domain benefits (physical, psychological, social) from an exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure).
items.curatedReason: 为机构化老年肌少症患者提供电子游戏锻炼（exergaming）是个值得推的方案。这项准实验研究显示，12 周的任天堂 Switch Ring Fit Adventure 锻炼，在身体、心理和社会功能上都有显著改善。这为你在临床实践中引入互动式技术提供了强有力证据。
items.titleZh: 电子游戏锻炼对机构化老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局。
items.summaryZh: 一项为期 12 周的准实验研究，对 72 名机构化老年肌少症患者进行干预，结果显示，电子游戏锻炼（任天堂 Switch Ring Fit Adventure）在身体、心理和社会结局方面均带来了显著的多领域益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exergaming for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia is a promising intervention. This quasi-experimental study shows 12 weeks of Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes. This provides strong evidence for integrating interactive technology into your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，无法完全排除潜在混杂因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a pragmatic quasi-experimental study, it cannot completely exclude the influence of potential confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found no significant difference in patient-reported outcomes and pain at 1 year post-primary total knee arthroplasty between those who received preoperative physiotherapy and those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 队列研究显示，术前物理治疗可能未能显著改善全膝关节置换术后 1 年的患者报告结局和疼痛。在考虑常规推荐术前 PT 时，请审慎评估其真实效用。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后 1 年患者报告结局：一项基于注册表的 1,688 例患者队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册表的队列研究，分析了 1,688 例全膝关节置换术患者的数据，发现在术前接受物理治疗的患者与未接受的患者相比，术后 1 年的患者报告结局和疼痛没有显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cohort study suggests preoperative physiotherapy may not significantly improve patient-reported outcomes and pain at 1 year post-total knee arthroplasty. Exercise caution when routinely recommending preoperative PT based on its actual efficacy.
items.limitation: 本研究为注册表队列研究，无法排除混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a registry-based cohort study, it cannot exclude confounding factors influencing the results.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (N=60) compared therapeutic massage, conventional physiotherapy, and a combined approach for chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome, showing short-term effects on pain, pressure pain threshold, and functional disability.
items.curatedReason: 对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩单独使用或与常规物理治疗结合可能在短期内有效。但记住，这是小样本短期 RCT，长期效果和最佳组合仍需更多高证据量研究来明确。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效应：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项对 60 名慢性上斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者进行的随机对照试验表明，治疗性按摩单独使用或与常规物理治疗结合，在改善疼痛、压痛阈和功能障碍方面可能具有短期效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Therapeutic massage, alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, may be effective for myofascial pain syndrome in the short term. However, this is a small-sample, short-term RCT; long-term effects and optimal combinations require further high-evidence research.
items.limitation: 本研究为小样本短期 RCT，结果的长期有效性和外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample, short-term RCT, limiting the long-term validity and generalizability of its findings.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study exploring Australian physiotherapists' experiences with the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention found it acceptable but highlighted the need for training, flexibility, and system-level enablers for optimal implementation.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 步行和教育项目对理疗师来说是可接受的，但在实际推广中，需要更灵活的培训和系统级支持。这提醒你在设计预防项目时，必须考量临床一线执行的便利性和支持体系。
items.titleZh: WalkBack 计划（步行与教育）在预防腰痛方面的实施：一项定性研究揭示物理治疗师的接受度、培训、灵活性和系统支持依赖。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究发现，澳大利亚物理治疗师普遍接受用于预防腰痛的 WalkBack（步行与教育）项目，但其成功实施依赖于充分培训、项目灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack walking and education program is acceptable to physiotherapists, but its real-world implementation requires flexible training and system-level support. This highlights the need to consider ease of execution and support systems when designing preventive programs.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，结果基于访谈，不提供量化的效果或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study, based on interviews, does not provide quantitative effects or causal relationships.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored how the SupportPrim PT clinical decision support system, using AI for personalized treatment recommendations, influences decision-making processes for 11 patients and 10 physiotherapists in Norwegian primary healthcare for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.curatedReason: AI 辅助的临床决策支持系统（CDSS）正在进入肌骨康复领域。你需要开始了解这类工具如何影响你的决策过程和患者体验，尤其是在北欧 PT 诊所中，CDSS 对 PT 执业的影响正在逐步显现。
items.titleZh: 肌骨疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了人工智能驱动的临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 如何影响挪威初级保健中肌骨疾病患者（11 名）和物理治疗师（10 名）的决策过程，该系统提供个性化治疗建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: AI-assisted Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) are entering musculoskeletal rehabilitation. You need to understand how these tools impact your decision-making and patient experience, especially as CDSS influence on PT practice is emerging in Nordic PT clinics.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，基于有限数量的访谈，结果不具普遍代表性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study, based on a limited number of interviews, does not offer generalizable results.

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: A mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS), comparing non-surgical management and hip arthroscopy, including a military-related section.
items.curatedReason: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征 (FAIS) 的患者决策辅助工具（PDA）正在开发中。这类工具的出现将有助于患者更好地理解保守治疗和髋关节镜手术的利弊，为你与患者的共同决策提供结构化支持。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法研究开发并测试了用于股骨髋臼撞击综合征 (FAIS) 的患者决策辅助工具，该工具旨在帮助患者比较非手术管理和髋关节镜手术的利弊，并包含一个与军事相关的部分。
items.curatedReasonEn: A patient decision aid (PDA) for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS) is under development. Such tools will help patients better understand the pros and cons of conservative management and hip arthroscopy, providing structured support for shared decision-making.
items.limitation: 本研究关注决策辅助工具的开发和用户测试过程，不涉及临床疗效的评估。
items.limitationEn: This study focuses on the development and user-testing of a decision aid, not the evaluation of clinical efficacy.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study classified stroke-specific movement patterns during passage through narrow openings, comparing 23 stroke individuals, 23 age-matched adults, and 12 young adults to identify associated factors.
items.curatedReason: 中风患者在通过狭窄空间时会表现出特定的运动模式。理解这些模式有助于你更精准地评估患者功能障碍，并设计更有针对性的康复干预，尤其是在环境适应性训练方面。
items.titleZh: 中风患者通过狭窄开口时的特定运动模式：一项横断面研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究对 23 名中风患者、23 名年龄匹配的社区居民和 12 名年轻成年人进行了比较，旨在分类中风患者通过狭窄开口时的运动模式，并识别相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke patients exhibit specific movement patterns when navigating narrow openings. Understanding these patterns helps you more accurately assess functional deficits and design targeted rehabilitation interventions, especially for environmental adaptation training.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法建立运动模式与中风严重程度或恢复之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causal relationships between movement patterns and stroke severity or recovery.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: A scoping review (18 studies) mapped behavior change theories, techniques, and effectiveness of self-management interventions for neurological conditions, covering stroke, spinal cord injury, and multiple sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围审查明确了神经系统疾病自我管理干预中常用的行为改变理论和技术。它可以帮助你优化患者教育和自我管理项目的设计，确保其基于现有证据且具备行为改变的理论基础。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容及影响的范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述（涵盖 18 项研究）绘制了神经系统疾病自我管理干预中使用的行为改变理论、技术及其有效性，内容涉及中风、脊髓损伤和多发性硬化症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review clarifies behavior change theories and techniques commonly used in self-management interventions for neurological disorders. It can help you optimize the design of patient education and self-management programs, ensuring they are evidence-based and theoretically grounded in behavior change.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重于映射现有文献，不评估干预措施的有效性或提供量化数据。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review focuses on mapping existing literature, not evaluating intervention effectiveness or providing quantitative data.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: A qualitative interview study explored the experiences of 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery standards.
items.curatedReason: 在线团体运动对于帕金森病患者的可行性与益处已得到证实。这份定性研究揭示了康复和健身专业人员在提供在线团体运动时的实践经验，有助于你优化在线服务的交付标准和质量，提高患者依从性。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者的在线团体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验，以指导物理治疗实践和服务提供——一项定性访谈研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性访谈研究探讨了 10 名康复和健身专业人员为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动的经验，旨在为物理治疗实践和服务提供标准提供参考。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online group exercise has proven feasible and beneficial for people with Parkinson's disease. This qualitative study reveals the experiences of rehabilitation and fitness professionals delivering online group exercise, helping you optimize online service delivery standards and quality, and improve patient adherence.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果基于访谈，不提供量化的效果或普遍代表性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size and its findings are based on interviews, thus not offering quantitative effects or generalizable representation.

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=33) found Mulligan ankle taping combined with treadmill training improved ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle stability more than Kinesio taping or treadmill training alone in chronic stroke patients over six weeks.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性中风患者中，Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练可能比 Kinesio 贴扎或单纯跑步机训练在踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节稳定性方面有更优表现。下次处理中风患者的踝关节功能障碍时，可以考虑纳入 Mulligan 贴扎。
items.titleZh: 慢性中风患者中，肌内效贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了慢性中风患者中，Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎联合跑步机训练，以及单独跑步机训练的生物力学效应。结果显示，Mulligan 贴扎组在踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和踝关节稳定性方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: In chronic stroke patients, Mulligan ankle taping combined with treadmill training may outperform Kinesio taping or treadmill training alone in ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and ankle stability. Consider incorporating Mulligan taping when addressing ankle dysfunction in stroke patients.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量小且随访期短，长期效果和更大范围的适用性需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size and short follow-up period; long-term effects and broader applicability require further research.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: A systematic review using COSMIN methodology evaluated the measurement properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) in individuals with stroke, clarifying its psychometric properties.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述采用 COSMIN 方法学，明确了卒中后躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 的心理测量学特性，为临床应用提供了高证据等级的参考。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 心理测量学特性研究的系统综述（采用 COSMIN 方法学）
items.summaryZh: 一项采用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述评估了卒中后躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 的测量特性，阐明了其心理测量学特性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review, using the COSMIN methodology, clarifies the psychometric properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale (TIS) after stroke, providing a high-level evidence reference for clinical application.
items.limitation: 原始研究的异质性可能影响证据的总体确定性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity among included primary studies may affect the overall certainty of evidence.

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: This prospective RCT (n=60) found that an accelerated rehabilitation pathway, compared to a conservative one, for proximal hamstring tendon repair showed comparable clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry, with 2-year follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复术后与保守方案在临床结局、力量和功能对称性方面非劣效，为术后康复提供了更灵活的策略。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案 2 年随访结果：纵向与加速方案 (PHARRLAP) 研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性随机对照试验 (n=60) 发现，近端腘绳肌腱修复术后采用加速康复方案与保守方案相比，临床结局、力量和功能对称性相似，随访期为 2 年。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol is non-inferior to a conservative protocol in clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry after proximal hamstring avulsion repair, offering a more flexible strategy for postoperative rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（每组 30 人），长期随访数据可能需要进一步证实。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small (30 per group), and long-term follow-up data may require further confirmation.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study of 333 ACDF patients found that sarcopenia was associated with an increased risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years post-surgery.
items.curatedReason: 该回顾性队列研究提示，肌少症是颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术 (ACDF) 术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险因素，值得你术前筛查并纳入康复考量。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 333 例颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术 (ACDF) 患者的探索性回顾性队列研究发现，肌少症与术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变风险增加相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study suggests sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years after Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF), warranting preoperative screening and inclusion in rehabilitation considerations.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，存在选择偏倚，且可能未能完全控制所有混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, subject to selection bias and possibly not fully controlling for all confounding factors.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 1350 NSMSP patients found that socio-cultural factors were associated with pain intensity, disability, and HRQoL at baseline and follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项大样本前瞻性队列研究，提示社会文化因素与非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的短期和长期预后相关联。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化预测因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 1350 名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素与基线和随访期间的疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量 (HRQoL) 相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large prospective cohort study indicates that socio-cultural factors are associated with short- and long-term outcomes of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain.
items.limitation: 研究人群仅限于荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者，结果外推性需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients, so generalizability requires caution.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: A prospective observational reliability study found that digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment had good reliability (ICC > 0.75) and acceptable measurement error in 60 patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈评估中显示出良好的信度和可接受的测量误差，可供临床实践参考。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中的信度：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性观察性信度研究发现，数字测痛仪在 60 名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的压力痛阈评估中具有良好的信度 (ICC > 0.75) 和可接受的测量误差。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold assessment demonstrates good reliability and acceptable measurement error in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, offering a useful reference for clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，可能限制结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size and was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, which may restrict generalizability.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: An observational cohort study of 317 severely injured trauma patients in Norway found that only 10% received physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist assessment within 72 hours, with early assessment in 43% of spinal cord injury patients.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心的数据提示，严重创伤患者早期获得物理医学与康复专家会诊的比例偏低，为优化多学科康复介入提供了改进空间。
items.titleZh: 创伤患者的早期康复：两项挪威创伤中心的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对挪威 317 名严重创伤患者的观察性队列研究发现，仅有 10% 的患者在 72 小时内接受了物理医学与康复专家的评估，其中 43% 的脊髓损伤患者获得了早期评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: Data from Norwegian trauma centers suggest a low rate of early physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist consultations for severely injured trauma patients, indicating room for improvement in multidisciplinary rehabilitation intervention.
items.limitation: 这是一项观察性队列研究，无法建立因果关系，且数据来自两个挪威创伤中心，可能不具广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: As an observational cohort study, it cannot establish causality, and data from only two Norwegian trauma centers may not be widely representative.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 ACL-injured patients (from a cohort of 275) who returned to sport identified mindset, effort, and support as the overarching categories influencing their decision to return to sport.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策背后的核心要素：心态、努力和支持，帮助你更全面地理解和引导患者决策。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持——ACL 损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：一项来自 NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 112 名 ACL 损伤后重返运动患者（来自 275 人的队列）的定性分析确定，心态、努力和支持是影响他们重返运动决策的首要因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals the core elements behind ACL injury patients' return-to-sport decisions: mindset, effort, and support, helping you more comprehensively understand and guide patient choices.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍性受限，可能无法完全代表所有 ACL 损伤患者群体的经验。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative findings is limited and may not fully represent the experiences of all ACL injury patient populations.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fractures, revealing their concerns about falls and fear of falling (FoF), and its impact on daily life and rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究强调了骨质疏松性上肢脆性骨折老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的独特视角和需求，提示你在康复计划中需更关注心理社会层面。
items.titleZh: 上肢脆性骨折伴骨质疏松症老年人对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法与需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了上肢脆性骨折伴骨质疏松症老年人的视角，揭示了他们对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧 (FoF) 的担忧，及其对日常生活和康复的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights the unique perspectives and needs of older adults with osteoporotic upper extremity fragility fractures regarding fall risk and fear of falling, suggesting a greater focus on psychosocial aspects in rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 定性研究的结果通常不具备广泛的普遍性，可能无法代表所有老年骨质疏松患者的经验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study results typically lack broad generalizability and may not represent the experiences of all older adults with osteoporosis.

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: A small retrospective cohort study found that a community-based, high-dose, high-intensity Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy (NG-NAT) intervention significantly reduced upper extremity motor impairment in stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提示，社区型高剂量、高强度神经动画治疗能有效改善卒中后上肢功能障碍，为推广社区康复模式提供了初步依据。
items.titleZh: 社区型下一代神经动画疗法对卒中后上肢功能障碍的疗效：小型回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项小型回顾性队列研究发现，社区型高剂量、高强度下一代神经动画疗法 (NG-NAT) 干预显著减轻了卒中幸存者的上肢运动障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study suggests that community-based high-dose, high-intensity neuroanimation therapy effectively improves upper extremity impairment after stroke, providing preliminary evidence for expanding community rehabilitation models.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，存在内在偏倚和混杂因素，缺乏对照组，无法确证因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study has inherent biases and confounding factors, lacks a control group, and cannot confirm causality.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study (n=30) successfully performed the cross-cultural adaptation of the Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM) into Mexican Spanish (PRISM-MX) and showed preliminary internal consistency and convergent validity.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 的跨文化适应性及其初步心理测量学评估为墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者的评估提供了新的工具，但尚需进一步验证。
items.titleZh: 卒中后痉挛患者报告影响量表 (PRISM-MX) 的跨文化适应与初步心理测量学评估：以墨西哥样本为例
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面预试验研究 (n=30) 成功将卒中后痉挛患者报告影响量表 (PRISM) 跨文化适应为墨西哥西班牙语版本 (PRISM-MX)，并显示出初步的内部一致性和收敛效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary psychometric evaluation of PRISM-MX offer a new assessment tool for post-stroke spasticity in Mexican patients, though further validation is needed.
items.limitation: 这是一项初步的横断面研究，样本量小 (n=30)，且仅评估了内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.limitationEn: This was a preliminary cross-sectional pilot study with a small sample size (n=30), only evaluating internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon found that only 38.3% (n=36) of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence (≥50% of prescribed sessions).
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的研究揭示了脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗依从性的挑战，为类似发展中国家的临床服务改进提供了本地洞见。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗的可及性和依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆进行的横断面研究发现，仅有 38.3% (n=36) 的脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗（5 个月前），且仅有 38.3% 的儿童表现出良好依从性（完成 ≥50% 的处方疗程）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study from Cameroon highlights challenges in early physiotherapy adherence among children with cerebral palsy, offering local insights for clinical service improvement in similar developing countries.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且仅限于喀麦隆单一地区的儿童，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: Being a cross-sectional study, it cannot establish causality, and its focus on children in a single region of Cameroon limits the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: A pilot randomized clinical trial involving 68 participants found that manual therapy as an adjunct to pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible, with preliminary signals of treatment effects on patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步的 RCT 提示，在肩袖相关疼痛的物理治疗中，手法治疗作为辅助手段是可行的，并提供了其有效性的初步信号，但尚不足以改变当前实践。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合实用物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的有效性：一项初步随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 68 名参与者的初步随机临床试验发现，手法治疗作为肩袖相关肩痛实用物理治疗的辅助手段是可行的，并显示出对患者报告结局的初步治疗效果信号。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot RCT suggests that manual therapy as an adjunct to physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain is feasible and shows preliminary signals of effectiveness, but it's not yet practice-changing.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性非劣效性飞行试验，样本量有限（68 名参与者），主要目的是评估大型试验的可行性，而非确证治疗效果。
items.limitationEn: This was an exploratory non-inferiority pilot trial with a limited sample size (68 participants), primarily focused on assessing feasibility for a larger trial rather than confirming treatment effects.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group with 55 pediatric clinicians evaluated UK clinicians' views on adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric MSK services.
items.curatedReason: 这份针对英国物理治疗师的调查和焦点小组研究，为你了解 MSK-HQ 量表在儿科肌骨康复中应用的挑战和前景提供了基础，有助于指导未来儿科结局量表的本地化和采纳。
items.titleZh: 为儿科肌肉骨骼护理调整 MSK-HQ 量表：来自全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 55 名儿科临床医师（包括物理治疗师）的全国调查和焦点小组评估了英国临床医师对于调整肌肉骨骼健康问卷（MSK-HQ）以用于儿科肌肉骨骼服务的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey and focus group study with UK physiotherapists provides a foundation for understanding the challenges and prospects of adapting the MSK-HQ for pediatric musculoskeletal rehabilitation, guiding future localization and adoption of pediatric outcome measures.
items.limitation: 研究依赖于自我报告和焦点小组数据，可能存在选择偏倚和参与者观点的主观性。
items.limitationEn: The study relied on self-reported and focus group data, which may be subject to selection bias and subjective participant views.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped current evidence on ChatGPT's use in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, focusing on how the technology has been studied across various clinical tasks, study designs, and interaction conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述概述了 ChatGPT 在肌骨物理治疗中研究应用的现状，帮你了解这项技术目前被如何探索，而非其临床有效性。它提醒你，当前研究多集中于探索性应用，离临床实践仍有距离。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的应用价值：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的现有证据，侧重于该技术在不同临床任务、研究设计和交互条件下的研究方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review outlines the current research landscape of ChatGPT's application in musculoskeletal physiotherapy, helping you understand how the technology is being explored rather than its clinical effectiveness. It reminds you that current studies are mostly exploratory, still distant from clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本综述是范围综述，侧重于映射现有研究而非对效果进行批判性评估，因此未提供 ChatGPT 在物理治疗中有效性的直接证据。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review focused on mapping existing research rather than critically appraising effectiveness, thus it does not provide direct evidence of ChatGPT's effectiveness in physiotherapy.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: A B-A-B single-case study found that contralateral resistance handgrip exercises performed with the non-paretic hand immediately and sustainably reduced hand edema in patients more than 3 months post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项单病例研究提示，对侧健康手的握力练习可能有助于减轻卒中后偏瘫手的浮肿。这为你提供了一个低成本、易于居家操作的潜在辅助干预选项，值得在临床中尝试性应用。
items.titleZh: 对侧握力练习对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续影响
items.summaryZh: 一项 B-A-B 单病例研究发现，非偏瘫手的对侧阻力握力练习可即时且持续地减轻卒中后 3 个月以上患者的手部水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This single-case study suggests that contralateral handgrip exercise may help reduce hand edema in paretic hands post-stroke. This offers a low-cost, easily home-based potential adjunctive intervention, worth exploring in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项 B-A-B 单病例设计研究，样本量小，结果的普适性有待大型 RCT 验证。
items.limitationEn: This was a B-A-B single-case design study with a small sample size; the generalizability of the results requires validation through larger RCTs.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions (TCIs) in stroke rehabilitation by searching five databases from 2012-2026, screening 4,663 abstracts.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述帮你系统性地了解了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预（TCI）的组成部分和结局指标，为你在管理卒中患者出院和居家康复衔接时提供了全面的视角和潜在的干预方向。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预及结局测量：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述通过检索 2012-2026 年的五个数据库，筛选了 4,663 篇摘要，旨在识别卒中康复中过渡期护理干预（TCI）的干预组成部分和结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review helps you systematically understand the components and outcome measures of transitional care interventions (TCIs) in stroke rehabilitation, providing a comprehensive perspective and potential intervention directions for managing stroke patient discharge and home rehabilitation transitions.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，它主要描述现有文献而非评估干预措施的有效性，因此无法提供关于哪种 TCI 最有效的直接证据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it primarily describes existing literature rather than evaluating intervention effectiveness, so it cannot provide direct evidence on which TCI is most effective.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined 6 pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) when delivering instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions for 12 children with neurodevelopmental disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过直接观察揭示了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中如何运用注意力焦点（FOA）进行指导和反馈。这为你优化远程康复教学策略提供了实用洞察，尤其是在资源受限的环境中。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗中运用注意力焦点进行指导和反馈：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了 6 名儿科物理治疗师在为 12 名神经发育障碍儿童提供远程医疗服务时，如何运用注意力焦点（FOA）进行指导和反馈。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study, through direct observation, reveals how pediatric physiotherapists use focus of attention (FOA) for instruction and feedback in telehealth. This provides practical insights for optimizing your tele-rehabilitation teaching strategies, especially in resource-limited settings.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性观察研究，样本量小（6 名物理治疗师，12 名儿童），可能存在观察者偏倚，且无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was an exploratory observational study with a small sample size (6 physiotherapists, 12 children), potentially subject to observer bias, and cannot establish causality.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 80 children with TBI in a pediatric ICU found that high mobility occurred in 53% of occupational therapy and 56.3% of physical therapy evaluations, identifying participation barriers.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对创伤性脑损伤（TBI）儿童的早期动员研究，通过识别常见障碍，为你提供了优化 PICU（儿科重症监护室）中 PT/OT 干预策略的依据，有助于提高早期动员的比例。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期动员的障碍与趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项对儿科 ICU 中 80 名 TBI 儿童进行的回顾性队列研究发现，高强度动员在 53% 的职业治疗评估和 56.3% 的物理治疗评估中发生，并识别了参与障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on early mobilization in children with traumatic brain injury (TBI), by identifying common barriers, provides evidence for optimizing PT/OT intervention strategies in the PICU, helping to increase early mobilization rates.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，单中心数据（80 名儿童，189 次治疗），结果可能不完全适用于其他机构或人群，且存在回顾性研究的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study with single-center data (80 children, 189 therapy sessions), so the results may not be fully generalizable to other institutions or populations, and it has the inherent limitations of retrospective studies.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: A study validated the Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, demonstrating its accuracy in measuring stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time compared to video truth data.
items.curatedReason: 这款名为 PREEMPT 的活动监测器在健康老年人和住院患者中进行了验证，证明其在急性护理环境中测量步态和活动指标的准确性和有效性。你可以将其作为评估和监测住院患者活动水平的潜在工具。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性护理患者的活动监测器：患者/居民活动追踪器（PREEMPT）
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了患者/居民活动追踪器（PREEMPT）活动监测器在 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者中的应用，与视频真相数据相比，证明其在测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐时间及活动时间方面的准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor has been validated in healthy older adults and hospitalized patients, demonstrating its accuracy and validity in measuring gait and activity metrics in acute care settings. You can consider it a potential tool for assessing and monitoring activity levels in hospitalized patients.
items.limitation: 验证研究的样本量相对较小（10 名健康老年人，46 名住院患者），且仅评估了与视频真相数据的符合度，未与其他成熟设备进行比较。
items.limitationEn: The validation study had a relatively small sample size (10 healthy older adults, 46 hospitalized patients) and only assessed agreement with video truth data, without comparison to other established devices.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded, pragmatic randomized controlled trial found that 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation for cancer survivors was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，针对癌症幸存者的居家远程康复运动是安全的，但其生活质量改善效果不优于单次物理治疗咨询。这提醒你，在追求远程医疗可及性的同时，也要关注其真实临床效应的边界。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但改善生活质量不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法的实用随机对照试验发现，针对癌症幸存者的 8 周团体运动远程康复是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that home-based telerehabilitation exercise for cancer survivors is safe, but its effect on improving quality of life is not superior to a single physiotherapy consultation. This reminds you to consider the boundaries of real clinical effects when pursuing telehealth accessibility.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告具体的生活质量效应量，且对照组仅接受单次咨询，可能未充分体现常规面对面康复的完整效果。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report specific quality of life effect sizes, and the control group received only a single consultation, which may not fully represent the complete effect of regular in-person rehabilitation.

items.title: Effects of Aerobic Exercise on Inflammatory Biomarkers, Pain Intensity, and Quality of Life in Patients with Non-Specific Chronic Low Back Pain: A Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 41 participants with non-specific chronic low back pain found that 12 weeks of supervised aerobic cycling significantly reduced inflammatory biomarkers (IL-6, TNF-α), pain intensity (NRS, RMDQ), and improved quality of life (SF-36) compared to a health education-only control group.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 坐实了有氧运动能显著减轻非特异性慢性腰痛患者的炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度并改善生活质量。这意味着，有氧训练应作为该类患者的一线干预手段之一，直接改变你的临床处方。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动对非特异性慢性腰痛患者炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 41 名非特异性慢性腰痛患者的随机对照试验发现，与仅接受健康教育的对照组相比，12 周的有氧自行车训练显著降低了炎症生物标志物（IL-6, TNF-α）、疼痛强度（NRS, RMDQ），并改善了生活质量（SF-36）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that aerobic exercise significantly reduces inflammatory biomarkers, pain intensity, and improves quality of life in patients with non-specific chronic low back pain. This means aerobic training should be one of the first-line interventions for these patients, directly changing your clinical prescriptions.
items.limitation: 研究的随访期为 12 周，仅提供了中期效果，长期效应仍需进一步研究确认。
items.limitationEn: The study's follow-up period was 12 weeks, providing only medium-term effects; long-term effects still require further research confirmation.

items.title: Six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a retrospective cohort study - Clinical Rheumatology
items.summary: A six-session non-operative exercise program delivered over one year to end-stage knee OA patients awaiting TKR was associated with improvements in pain and patient-reported/performance outcomes, with some benefits persisting for up to 18 months.
items.curatedReason: 针对等待关节置换的终末期膝骨关节炎患者，一个由六次训练组成的非手术运动方案可带来长达 18 个月的持续益处。这为术前管理提供了有价值的证据。
items.titleZh: 六次非手术运动方案对终末期膝骨关节炎患者产生长达 18 个月的持续益处：一项回顾性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝骨关节炎患者，为期一年的六次非手术运动方案能持续改善疼痛及各项患者报告和基于表现的结局，部分益处持续长达 18 个月。
items.curatedReasonEn: A six-session non-operative exercise program provided sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee OA patients awaiting TKR, offering valuable evidence for pre-surgical management.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective cohort study, subject to selection bias and confounding factors.

items.summary: This systematic review with longitudinal and multivariate meta-analysis details the recovery of quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和多元荟萃分析详细阐述了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的恢复情况。它提供了高质量的证据，让你在制定康复计划和设定恢复目标时有更坚实的依据。
items.titleZh: ACL 重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的纵向与多元荟萃分析：系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述及纵向多元荟萃分析详细探讨了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的恢复情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and multivariate meta-analysis details quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength recovery after ACL reconstruction. It provides high-quality evidence, giving you a stronger basis for developing rehabilitation plans and setting recovery goals.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析结果可能受纳入研究异质性的影响。
items.limitationEn: Meta-analysis results may be affected by heterogeneity of included studies.

items.title: E-health StandingTall balance exercise for fall prevention in older people: results of a two year randomised controlled trial
items.summary: Results of a two-year randomized controlled trial showed that StandingTall, a home-based e-health balance exercise program delivered through an app, provided an effective, self-managed fall prevention program for community-dwelling older people.
items.curatedReason: 这项为期两年的随机对照试验显示，居家式电子健康平衡训练程序 StandingTall 能有效预防社区老年人的跌倒。这是高质量证据，强烈支持你在老年跌倒预防中推荐和应用类似数字干预方案。
items.titleZh: E-health StandingTall 平衡训练预防老年人跌倒：一项为期两年的随机对照试验结果。
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验结果显示，通过应用程序提供的居家式电子健康平衡训练程序 StandingTall，为社区居住的老年人提供了一个有效的、自我管理的跌倒预防方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This two-year randomized controlled trial showed that the home-based e-health balance exercise program StandingTall effectively prevented falls in community-dwelling older adults. This is high-quality evidence strongly supporting your recommendation and application of similar digital intervention programs in geriatric fall prevention.
items.limitation: 研究结果的长期效应和不同人群的外推性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: Long-term effects and generalizability to different populations still require further validation.

items.title: Management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction: a clinical practice guideline in Germany – update 3.0 | International Urology and Nephrology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This is an update to a clinical practice guideline in Germany for the management and implementation of intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 这份德国临床实践指南更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿的管理和实施，为你提供了最新的循证实践推荐。留意其适用地理范围。
items.titleZh: 德国神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿管理与实施临床实践指南——3.0 版更新。
items.summaryZh: 这份德国临床实践指南对神经源性下尿路功能障碍的间歇性导尿管理与实施进行了 3.0 版更新。
items.curatedReasonEn: This updated German clinical practice guideline on the management and implementation of intermittent catheterization for neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction provides you with the latest evidence-based recommendations. Be mindful of its geographical applicability.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: An international research team has restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models using a combined fusogenic therapy and comprehensive rehabilitation protocol.
items.curatedReason: 一项动物模型研究报道了融合治疗结合全面康复在完全性脊髓横断后恢复运动、感觉和盆腔功能。这是基础研究的重大进展，但临床转化仍需漫长验证。
items.titleZh: 融合治疗在完全性脊髓横断后恢复脊髓功能。
items.summaryZh: 一个国际研究团队通过融合治疗与全面康复相结合的方案，在动物模型中恢复了完全性脊髓横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: An animal model study reported the restoration of motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection using fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation. This is a significant advance in basic research, but clinical translation requires extensive validation.
items.limitation: 动物模型研究，结果不一定能直接推导至人类。
items.limitationEn: Animal model study, results may not directly translate to humans.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: This study analyzed prospective data from a pilot trial to evaluate the association between ventral hernia repair and patient functional status over time using TUG and 5xSTS tests.
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修补术后的功能状态变化研究显示，患者在术后不同时间点的 TUG 和 5×STS 评分有所改善，但这种改善有其上限。它提醒你关注患者术后功能恢复的轨迹，并管理预期。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修补术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善极限。
items.summaryZh: 本研究分析了前瞻性数据，旨在评估腹壁疝修补术与患者功能状态随时间变化的关联，采用 TUG 和 5×STS 测试作为评估工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on functional status after ventral hernia repair shows improvements in TUG and 5xSTS scores at various postoperative time points, but also limits to this improvement. It reminds you to monitor the trajectory of functional recovery and manage patient expectations.
items.limitation: 研究样本量、特定人群和随访时间可能限制结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: Study sample size, specific population, and follow-up duration may limit generalizability.

items.title: Acupuncture for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases: mechanisms and clinical evidence | European Spine Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This review article explores the mechanisms and clinical evidence of acupuncture for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述总结了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制和临床证据。它提供了一个视角，但需要高等级证据支持其常规应用。
items.titleZh: 针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制与临床证据。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的作用机制与临床证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review summarizes the mechanisms and clinical evidence for acupuncture in postoperative rehabilitation for degenerative lumbar spinal diseases. It offers a perspective, but high-level evidence is needed for its routine application.
items.limitation: 综述的证据等级和纳入研究的异质性可能影响结论强度。
items.limitationEn: The evidence level of the review and heterogeneity of included studies may affect the strength of conclusions.

items.title: Urogenital Hiatus Closure System: A Framework for Understanding how Muscle, Motor Control, and Fascial Connections Interact in Normal and Failed Closure
items.summary: This review article presents a framework for understanding how muscle, motor control, and fascial connections interact in the normal and failed closure of the urogenital hiatus system.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提出了一个理解泌尿生殖裂孔关闭系统的框架，强调肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接的相互作用。它加深了你对盆底功能障碍病理生理学的理解，特别是对盆底康复的解剖学和生物力学原理的理解。
items.titleZh: 泌尿生殖裂孔关闭系统：理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接如何在正常和失败关闭中相互作用的框架。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述提出一个框架，用以理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接如何在泌尿生殖裂孔的正常和失败关闭中相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review presents a framework for understanding the urogenital hiatus closure system, emphasizing the interaction of muscle, motor control, and fascial connections. It deepens your understanding of pelvic floor dysfunction pathophysiology, particularly the anatomical and biomechanical principles underlying pelvic floor rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一篇框架性综述，没有提供新的实验数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework review, not providing new experimental data.

items.title: Prehabilitation in older adults with cancer: scoping review of surgical outcomes | BMJ Supportive & Palliative Care
items.summary: This scoping review evaluates the impact of prehabilitation on surgical outcomes in older adults with cancer, providing evidence for preoperative intervention strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述评估了癌症老年患者术前康复对外科结局的影响。它为你在肿瘤康复领域制定术前干预策略提供了证据支持，尤其是在提高老年患者手术耐受性方面。
items.titleZh: 癌症老年患者术前康复：外科结局的范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 本范围综述评估了癌症老年患者术前康复对外科结局的影响，为术前干预策略提供了证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review evaluated the impact of prehabilitation on surgical outcomes in older adults with cancer. It provides evidence to support your development of preoperative intervention strategies in oncology rehabilitation, particularly in improving surgical tolerance in older patients.
items.limitation: 范围综述，可能未对纳入研究进行严格的质量评估。
items.limitationEn: Scoping review, may not have strictly evaluated the quality of included studies.

items.title: Prevalence and potential influencing factors of social frailty among community-dwelling older adults in China: systematic review and meta-analysis | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the prevalence and potential influencing factors of social frailty among community-dwelling older adults in China.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析总结了中国社区老年人社会性虚弱的患病率和潜在影响因素。它为你理解和识别中国特定文化背景下的老年虚弱提供了重要流行病学数据。
items.titleZh: 中国社区老年人社会性虚弱的患病率和潜在影响因素：系统综述和荟萃分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析研究了中国社区老年人社会性虚弱的患病率及其潜在影响因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes the prevalence and potential influencing factors of social frailty among community-dwelling older adults in China. It provides you with important epidemiological data for understanding and identifying geriatric frailty within a specific cultural context in China.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析结果的异质性可能影响结论的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity of meta-analysis results may affect generalizability of conclusions.

items.title: The economic evaluation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease care: Quality and cost – a web of science-based systematic review - ScienceDirect
items.summary: This systematic review based on Web of Science evaluates the economic aspects of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease care, focusing on quality and cost.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于 Web of Science 的系统综述评估了慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）护理的经济学评价，包括质量和成本。它为你理解 COPD 康复的成本效益和政策制定提供了宏观视角。
items.titleZh: 慢性阻塞性肺疾病护理的经济学评价：质量与成本——一项基于 Web of Science 的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 这项基于 Web of Science 的系统综述评估了慢性阻塞性肺疾病护理的经济学方面，重点关注质量和成本。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Web of Science-based systematic review evaluated the economic aspects of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) care, including quality and cost. It provides you with a macro perspective for understanding the cost-effectiveness of COPD rehabilitation and policy development.
items.limitation: 综述的结论可能受纳入研究异质性和方法学质量的影响。
items.limitationEn: The conclusions of the review may be affected by the heterogeneity and methodological quality of the included studies.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: This multicenter randomized pragmatic trial protocol (SKOAP Phase 2) compares intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心随机实用试验方案旨在比较关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的疗效。它将提供不同介入治疗手段的头对头比较证据，直接影响你在骨关节炎疼痛管理中的转诊和协同决策。
items.titleZh: 关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的多中心随机实用试验：SKOAP 2 期方案。
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心随机实用试验方案（SKOAP 2 期）旨在比较关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融术治疗膝骨关节炎疼痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter randomized pragmatic trial protocol aims to compare intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain. It will provide head-to-head comparative evidence for different interventional treatments, directly impacting your referral and collaborative decisions in osteoarthritis pain management.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未有实际结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; actual results are not yet available.

items.title: Piloting a Tier 1 Strength-Based Parent Education Play Program: Promoting Play Within the Family Context
items.summary: This pilot, mixed-methods pre-post study assessed the effectiveness of a Tier 1 strength-based play program on parents' ability to support their child's play and build parental sense of competence.
items.curatedReason: 这项试点研究评估了以优势为基础的家长教育游戏项目对家长支持儿童游戏能力和提升育儿效能感的影响。它提示了早期干预中家长参与的重要性，并为未来大规模研究提供了基础。
items.titleZh: 试点一项以优势为基础的家长教育游戏项目：在家庭环境中促进游戏。
items.summaryZh: 这项混合方法的前后对照试点研究评估了 Tier 1 优势导向的游戏项目对家长支持子女游戏能力和提升育儿效能感的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study assessed the impact of a strength-based parent education play program on parents' ability to support child play and build parental sense of competence. It suggests the importance of parental involvement in early intervention and provides a basis for future large-scale studies.
items.limitation: 试点研究，样本量较小，且为虚拟设置，结果推广受限。
items.limitationEn: Pilot study with small sample size and virtual setting, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge: a qualitative study | BMC Pediatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This qualitative study used experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究利用经验共创设计，优化了 NICU 出院早产儿的远程家长介导干预项目。它展示了以患者为中心的设计方法在远程康复中的应用价值。
items.titleZh: 基于经验的协同设计以完善 NICU 出院早产儿的远程家长介导干预项目：一项定性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究利用基于经验的协同设计方法，旨在优化针对 NICU 出院早产儿的远程家长介导干预项目。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study used experience-based co-design to refine a remote parent-mediated intervention program for preterm infants after NICU discharge. It demonstrates the value of patient-centered design approaches in telerehabilitation.
items.limitation: 定性研究，结果无法量化或推广到更大人群。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study, results cannot be quantified or generalized to a larger population.

items.title: A dual-contrast deep learning model for automated assessment of sarcopenia using MRI | Abdominal Radiology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study developed a dual-contrast deep learning model for automated assessment of sarcopenia using MRI, providing a new tool for objective muscle mass evaluation.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发了一个双对比深度学习模型，用于自动化评估 MRI 中的肌少症。它代表了肌少症诊断工具的进步，未来可能辅助你更客观地评估肌肉质量和康复效果。
items.titleZh: 一种用于 MRI 自动化评估肌少症的双对比深度学习模型。
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发了一种利用 MRI 进行肌少症自动化评估的双对比深度学习模型，为客观评估肌肉质量提供了新工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a dual-contrast deep learning model for automated sarcopenia assessment using MRI. It represents an advance in sarcopenia diagnostic tools and may assist you in more objectively evaluating muscle mass and rehabilitation outcomes in the future.
items.limitation: AI 模型仍在开发和验证阶段，临床应用需进一步测试。
items.limitationEn: AI model is still in development and validation stages; clinical application requires further testing.

items.title: A plasma proteomic signature of cancer-related sarcopenia implicates the IGFBP axis in muscle dysfunction | Molecular Cancer | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This research identified a plasma proteomic signature of cancer-related sarcopenia, implicating the IGFBP axis in muscle dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现癌症相关肌少症的血浆蛋白质组学特征，并提示 IGFBP 轴在肌肉功能障碍中的作用。这加深了你对癌症康复中肌少症生物机制的理解，可能指导未来的靶向干预。
items.titleZh: 癌症相关肌少症的血浆蛋白质组学特征提示 IGFBP 轴在肌肉功能障碍中的作用。
items.summaryZh: 本研究发现癌症相关肌少症的血浆蛋白质组学特征，并提示胰岛素样生长因子结合蛋白（IGFBP）轴在肌肉功能障碍中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identified a plasma proteomic signature of cancer-related sarcopenia and implicated the IGFBP axis in muscle dysfunction. This deepens your understanding of the biological mechanisms of sarcopenia in cancer rehabilitation and may guide future targeted interventions.
items.limitation: 血浆标志物距离临床应用尚有距离，需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: Plasma biomarkers are still far from clinical application and require further validation.

items.title: Prevalence of frailty, multimorbidity, and polypharmacy and their association with health outcomes in hospitalized older adults: a prospective multicenter cohort study | BMC Geriatrics | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A prospective multicenter cohort study explored the prevalence of frailty, multimorbidity, and polypharmacy and their association with health outcomes in hospitalized older adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性多中心队列研究探讨了住院老年人虚弱、多重共病和多重用药的患病率及其与健康结局的关联。它强调了这些综合征对老年患者预后的重要影响，提醒你多维度评估和干预的必要性。
items.titleZh: 住院老年人虚弱、多重共病和多重用药的患病率及其与健康结局的关联：一项前瞻性多中心队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性多中心队列研究探讨了住院老年人虚弱、多重共病和多重用药的患病率及其与健康结局的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective multicenter cohort study investigated the prevalence of frailty, multimorbidity, and polypharmacy and their association with health outcomes in hospitalized older adults. It highlights the significant impact of these syndromes on geriatric patient prognosis, reminding you of the necessity for multidimensional assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，存在混杂因素的可能。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, unable to establish causality, with potential confounding factors.

items.title: A randomized controlled study on the effects of the T-REX Twente (Thoracic Surgical Rehabilitation Experts Twente) sternal precautions on quality of life and physical activity levels in cardiac surgery patients, compared to standard care in patients following a median sternotomy: the study protocol | Trials | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This study protocol describes a randomized controlled trial comparing the effects of T-REX Twente sternal precautions to standard care on quality of life and physical activity levels in cardiac surgery patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究方案描述了一项随机对照试验，旨在比较 T-REX Twente 胸骨预防措施与标准护理对心脏手术患者生活质量和体力活动水平的影响。虽然是方案，但其设计思路值得你关注心脏康复领域的实践创新。
items.titleZh: 比较 T-REX Twente 胸骨预防措施与标准护理对心脏手术患者生活质量和体力活动水平影响的随机对照研究：研究方案。
items.summaryZh: 本研究方案描述了一项随机对照研究，旨在比较 T-REX Twente 胸骨预防措施与标准护理对心脏手术患者生活质量和体力活动水平的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol describes a randomized controlled trial comparing T-REX Twente sternal precautions with standard care for cardiac surgery patients' quality of life and physical activity levels. Although a protocol, its design is worth noting for practical innovations in cardiac rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项研究方案，尚未有实际结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; actual results are not yet available.
